findings.finding: Action IDs shown without human-readable labels
Auth flow may not be using PKCE (no code_challenge in URL)
Auth0 login page has no privacy/terms links
Dashboard uses "actor" terminology — consider "your AI" or "assistant"
Inbox shows neither approvals nor clear empty state
No visible way to add memories/goals from the memories page
No data export option on memories page — GDPR portability gap
No Open Graph image — poor social sharing appearance
Capabilities page accessible without auth — exposes system capabilities to unauthenticated users
Memories page not discoverable from main nav
Full email displayed on dashboard — consider showing display name only
Internal actor UUID exposed on settings page — not a risk but may confuse users
